# LOGME

> 개발자를 위한 마크다운 블로그 플랫폼 (A Markdown Blog Platform for Developers)

LOGME is a Korean developer blog platform where developers write and share technical posts about programming, web development, software engineering, and related topics.
All public posts are written in Korean by software developers.

## Service

- Homepage: https://logme-io.vercel.app
- All Posts: https://logme-io.vercel.app/article
- Sitemap: https://logme-io.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

## Content

Public blog posts cover topics including:
- Web development (React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS)
- Software engineering practices
- Database design and optimization
- DevOps and cloud infrastructure
- Programming languages and algorithms
- Career and development culture

## Usage

This platform is indexed and publicly accessible. All posts at `/article/content/{id}` are individual blog posts.
Posts marked as private are not publicly accessible.
